summary: Produce a signed external adoption capsule with telemetry + receipts for partner nodes.

steps.title: Capture adoption capsule requirements
steps.notes: Documented capsule scope, CLI expectations, receipts, and risks from the queue brief.

steps.title: Design capsule manifest + CLI
steps.notes: Define packaging format, telemetry hooks, signature workflow, and CLI flags.

steps.title: Implement capsule, telemetry, and docs
steps.notes: Build tooling, emit receipts, update onboarding docs, and wire CI guard for capsule freshness.

checkpoint.description: Adoption capsule CLI produces signed artifacts + receipts and telemetry hooks verified in CI.
